stemHtml: A TA is triggered. Why shall the aircraft not manoeuvre?

options.a: TAs are used to increase situational awareness, intended to prompt visual acquisition.
options.b: The aircraft shall not maneuver only if ATC instructions are in conflict with TA's commands.
options.c: Under no circumstances may a pilot disregard the commands provided by a TA.
options.d: Because TAs are very often erraneous.
